title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design, train, and deploy ML models for production systems. Work on NLP and computer vision pipelines. Collaborate with research scientists to bring prototypes to production. Strong Python and deep learning framework experience required.

title: NLP Research Engineer
description: Build and fine-tune large language models for various NLP tasks. Design evaluation frameworks, implement RAG pipelines, and work on prompt engineering strategies. Research and develop novel approaches to language understanding and generation.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop real-time computer vision systems for autonomous driving. Train and optimize object detection models, implement image segmentation pipelines, and work with multi-camera sensor fusion. Experience with YOLO and real-time inference required.

title: Applied AI Scientist
description: Conduct applied research in machine learning and AI. Develop novel model architectures, run experiments at scale, and publish results. Work on multimodal learning, combining vision and language models for next-generation AI systems.

title: LLM Platform Engineer
description: Build and maintain the platform infrastructure for training and serving large language models. Develop fine-tuning pipelines, implement evaluation benchmarks, and create tooling for prompt engineering and AI agent development.

title: Data Scientist — Pricing & Strategy
description: Drive data-informed pricing decisions through quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and machine learning. Build forecasting models, analyze marketplace dynamics, and develop pricing optimization frameworks for ride-hailing products.

title: AI/ML Software Engineer
description: Build production ML systems integrating NLP, computer vision, and multimodal AI. Design APIs for model serving, implement CI/CD for ML pipelines, and develop tools for AI-assisted software development. Strong coding and ML fundamentals required.

title: Research Engineer — Multimodal AI
description: Develop multimodal AI systems combining vision and language understanding. Work on CLIP-style architectures, visual question answering, and cross-modal retrieval. Implement research prototypes and scale them for deployment.

title: SOC Analyst
description: Monitor security events and alerts using SIEM platforms. Investigate potential security incidents, perform initial triage, and escalate as needed. Maintain documentation of incidents and contribute to playbook development.

title: Palo Alto Firewall Engineer
description: Configure, manage, and troubleshoot Palo Alto next-generation firewalls across enterprise environments. Implement security policies, NAT rules, and VPN configurations. Work with Panorama for centralized management and WildFire for threat analysis.

title: PCNSE Certified Network Engineer
description: Lead the design and deployment of Palo Alto Networks security infrastructure across multi-site environments. Architect next-generation firewall solutions, implement zero trust network access, and mentor junior engineers. PCNSE certification required.

title: Penetration Tester
description: Conduct authorized penetration testing engagements against client networks, web applications, and infrastructure. Identify vulnerabilities, exploit weaknesses, and produce detailed reports with remediation recommendations.

title: Threat Intelligence Analyst
description: Collect, analyze, and disseminate threat intelligence from multiple sources. Track APT groups, develop IOCs, and produce intelligence reports. Integrate threat feeds into security operations workflows.

title: Security Operations Center Manager
description: Lead a team of SOC analysts in 24/7 security monitoring operations. Develop and refine incident response procedures, manage escalation workflows, and report to executive leadership on security posture and metrics.

title: Cloud Security Engineer
description: Implement and maintain security controls across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments. Configure cloud-native security services, manage IAM policies, and conduct cloud security assessments.

title: Junior Malware Analyst
description: Perform static and dynamic analysis of malicious software samples. Reverse-engineer malware to understand capabilities, persistence mechanisms, and communication protocols. Document findings and contribute to detection signatures.

title: Vulnerability Management Analyst
description: Conduct vulnerability scans across enterprise infrastructure using industry-standard tools. Prioritize findings based on risk, track remediation efforts, and generate compliance reports for stakeholders.

title: Identity and Access Management Engineer
description: Design and implement IAM solutions including SSO, MFA, and privileged access management. Manage Okta, Active Directory, and CyberArk deployments. Develop access governance policies and automate provisioning workflows.

title: Digital Forensics Investigator
description: Conduct digital forensic investigations on compromised systems, networks, and mobile devices. Preserve evidence chain of custody, perform disk and memory forensics, and prepare detailed reports for legal proceedings.

title: Application Security Engineer
description: Integrate security into the SDLC through code reviews, static and dynamic application security testing, and developer training. Manage SAST/DAST tools and triage findings with development teams.

title: Security Architect
description: Design enterprise security architectures aligned with business objectives and regulatory requirements. Evaluate emerging technologies, develop security reference architectures, and advise leadership on strategic security investments.

title: SOAR Platform Engineer
description: Build and maintain automated security workflows using SOAR platforms. Develop playbooks for common security incidents, integrate with SIEM and ticketing systems, and measure automation effectiveness.

title: Cortex XDR Analyst
description: Monitor and investigate alerts generated by Palo Alto Cortex XDR. Perform endpoint investigation, analyze behavioral indicators, and develop custom detection rules. Provide support for incident response activities.

title: Network Security Engineer
description: Design and implement network security solutions including firewalls, IDS/IPS, and VPN concentrators. Perform network segmentation, access control configuration, and security monitoring.

title: Incident Response Team Lead
description: Lead incident response engagements from detection through remediation. Coordinate cross-functional teams during active incidents, develop IR playbooks, and conduct post-incident reviews.

title: GRC Analyst
description: Support governance, risk, and compliance activities including security assessments, policy development, and audit preparation. Map controls to frameworks such as NIST, ISO 27001, and SOC 2.

title: Cryptography Engineer
description: Design and implement cryptographic protocols and key management systems. Evaluate post-quantum cryptography solutions, review code for cryptographic vulnerabilities, and advise on encryption standards.

title: Red Team Operator
description: Conduct advanced adversary simulations against enterprise environments. Develop custom tooling, evade detection systems, and emulate nation-state TTPs. Provide strategic recommendations based on engagement findings.

title: Prisma Cloud Security Engineer
description: Deploy and manage Palo Alto Prisma Cloud across multi-cloud environments. Configure cloud security posture management, workload protection, and container security policies. Integrate with CI/CD pipelines.

title: Email Security Specialist
description: Manage and monitor email security gateways to detect and prevent phishing, spam, and business email compromise. Analyze suspicious emails, configure DLP policies, and conduct phishing simulations.

title: XSIAM Platform Administrator
description: Administer Palo Alto Cortex XSIAM platform including data source onboarding, correlation rule development, and SOAR automation. Optimize detection coverage and reduce mean time to respond.

title: Container Security Engineer
description: Secure containerized environments across Kubernetes clusters. Implement admission controllers, network policies, and runtime security monitoring. Scan container images and manage vulnerability lifecycles.

title: Security Compliance Engineer
description: Implement technical controls to meet regulatory compliance requirements including PCI DSS, HIPAA, and SOX. Automate compliance checks, manage audit evidence collection, and maintain security documentation.

title: Wireless Security Engineer
description: Assess and secure wireless network infrastructure. Conduct wireless penetration testing, implement 802.1X authentication, and monitor for rogue access points. Design secure wireless architectures.

title: ICS/OT Security Engineer
description: Protect industrial control systems and operational technology environments. Conduct ICS security assessments, implement network segmentation between IT and OT, and develop ICS-specific incident response procedures.

title: Bug Bounty Researcher
description: Discover and responsibly report security vulnerabilities in web applications, APIs, and mobile apps through bug bounty programs. Focus on critical vulnerability classes including authentication bypasses, SSRF, and injection attacks.

title: Cyber Threat Hunter
description: Proactively search for advanced threats that bypass traditional security controls. Develop hunting hypotheses based on threat intelligence, analyze endpoint and network telemetry, and create detection content.

title: Junior SOC Analyst
description: Monitor security dashboards and alerts as part of a 24/7 SOC team. Perform initial triage of security events, document incidents in ticketing systems, and escalate confirmed threats to senior analysts.

title: Fortinet Firewall Administrator
description: Manage and optimize Fortinet FortiGate firewalls across distributed enterprise locations. Configure security policies, VPN tunnels, and SD-WAN functionality. Utilize FortiAnalyzer for log analysis and reporting.

title: Endpoint Security Engineer
description: Deploy and manage enterprise endpoint protection platforms. Develop custom detection rules, investigate endpoint alerts, and optimize EDR configurations to reduce false positives while maintaining detection coverage.

title: SIEM Engineer
description: Deploy, configure, and maintain enterprise SIEM platforms. Develop correlation rules, dashboards, and automated alerts. Onboard new log sources and optimize storage and performance.

title: Zero Trust Security Engineer
description: Architect and implement zero trust security frameworks across enterprise environments. Design identity-centric access policies, micro-segmentation strategies, and continuous verification mechanisms.

title: DevSecOps Engineer
description: Embed security practices into CI/CD pipelines. Implement automated security scanning, container image validation, and infrastructure-as-code security checks. Champion shift-left security culture across development teams.

title: Cyber Insurance Analyst
description: Evaluate cybersecurity posture of organizations applying for cyber insurance coverage. Assess risk based on security controls, incident history, and industry benchmarks. Produce risk scoring reports.

title: Security Awareness Training Specialist
description: Design and deliver cybersecurity awareness training programs. Manage phishing simulation campaigns, track completion metrics, and develop engaging training content for diverse audiences.

title: OSINT Investigator
description: Conduct open-source intelligence investigations to support corporate security, due diligence, and threat assessments. Use advanced search techniques, social media analysis, and domain reconnaissance tools.

title: Wazuh Security Engineer
description: Deploy and manage Wazuh SIEM/XDR platform for host-based intrusion detection, log analysis, and compliance monitoring. Develop custom rules, integrate with third-party tools, and manage agent deployments.

title: PAM Administrator
description: Administer privileged access management platforms including CyberArk and BeyondTrust. Manage credential vaults, session recording, and just-in-time access provisioning across hybrid environments.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design and implement scalable, highly available cloud architectures on AWS and Azure. Lead cloud migration strategies, define best practices, and mentor engineering teams on cloud-native development patterns.

title: AWS Cloud Engineer
description: Build and maintain AWS infrastructure for production workloads. Manage EC2 instances, configure networking with VPCs, implement CI/CD pipelines, and ensure high availability and disaster recovery.

title: Azure DevOps Engineer
description: Implement and manage CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps. Automate infrastructure provisioning, manage Azure Kubernetes Service clusters, and ensure seamless deployment workflows.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Ensure reliability and performance of large-scale distributed systems. Define and track SLOs, implement observability stacks, automate incident response, and lead blameless post-mortems.

title: Junior DevOps Engineer
description: Support CI/CD pipeline operations, assist with infrastructure automation, and help maintain container orchestration platforms. Learn and apply DevOps best practices in a fast-paced environment.

title: Infrastructure Engineer
description: Design and manage on-premises and cloud infrastructure. Automate server provisioning, manage VMware environments, and ensure network connectivity across hybrid deployments.

title: Platform Engineer
description: Build and maintain internal developer platforms. Create self-service infrastructure provisioning, manage service catalogs, and improve developer productivity through standardized tooling and golden paths.

title: Cloud Database Administrator
description: Manage cloud-hosted database services including RDS, Aurora, and DynamoDB. Optimize query performance, implement backup strategies, and ensure data security and compliance.

title: GCP Cloud Engineer
description: Deploy and manage workloads on Google Cloud Platform. Configure Compute Engine instances, manage GKE clusters, and implement data pipelines using BigQuery and Cloud Functions.

title: Kubernetes Administrator
description: Manage production Kubernetes clusters across multiple environments. Handle cluster upgrades, implement RBAC policies, configure ingress controllers, and troubleshoot pod scheduling issues.

title: Cloud Network Engineer
description: Design and implement cloud networking solutions including VPCs, transit gateways, and hybrid connectivity. Configure load balancers, DNS, and CDN services across multi-cloud environments.

title: Serverless Developer
description: Build event-driven serverless applications using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB. Design cost-efficient architectures and implement monitoring with CloudWatch.

title: Infrastructure as Code Engineer
description: Develop and maintain infrastructure-as-code modules using Terraform, Pulumi, and CloudFormation. Implement GitOps workflows, manage state files, and enforce infrastructure compliance policies.

title: Observability Engineer
description: Design and implement observability solutions using distributed tracing, metrics, and logging. Build dashboards, configure alerting, and help teams improve system reliability through data-driven insights.

title: Cloud Migration Specialist
description: Lead large-scale cloud migration projects from on-premises data centers to AWS and Azure. Assess application portfolios, develop migration strategies (rehost, replatform, refactor), and manage execution.

title: Junior Cloud Support Engineer
description: Provide technical support for cloud infrastructure issues. Troubleshoot EC2 instances, S3 configurations, and networking problems. Document solutions and contribute to knowledge base articles.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description: Develop and maintain full-stack web applications using React and Node.js. Design RESTful APIs, implement database schemas, and collaborate with product teams to deliver features on schedule.

title: Backend Software Engineer
description: Design and implement scalable backend services using Java and Spring Boot. Build microservices architectures, implement message queuing, and optimize database queries for high-throughput systems.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create responsive, accessible web interfaces using React and TypeScript. Implement design system components, optimize rendering performance, and ensure cross-browser compatibility.

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Write clean, tested code to implement new features and fix bugs. Participate in code reviews, learn development best practices, and collaborate with senior engineers in an agile environment.

title: Senior Software Architect
description: Define technical architecture for large-scale enterprise applications. Make technology stack decisions, establish coding standards, and lead architectural reviews. Mentor engineering teams and drive technical excellence.

title: Mobile Developer
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native. Implement native device features, optimize app performance, and manage app store releases for iOS and Android.

title: Python Developer
description: Develop backend services and automation tools using Python. Build REST APIs with FastAPI, implement data processing pipelines, and write comprehensive test suites.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Develop firmware for embedded systems and IoT devices. Write low-level C/C++ code, interface with hardware peripherals, and optimize for memory and power constraints.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Design and implement automated test frameworks for web and API testing. Write end-to-end tests, integrate testing into CI/CD pipelines, and champion quality engineering practices.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop smart contracts and decentralized applications on Ethereum and other blockchain platforms. Implement token standards, conduct security audits, and build Web3 interfaces.

title: API Developer
description: Design and develop RESTful and GraphQL APIs for consumer and enterprise applications. Implement authentication, rate limiting, and API versioning strategies. Maintain API documentation and SDKs.

title: Game Developer
description: Develop gameplay systems and engine features using C++ and C#. Optimize rendering performance, implement physics simulations, and collaborate with artists and designers.

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Build and maintain responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Learn React framework, participate in design reviews, and implement pixel-perfect UI components from mockups.

title: Go Backend Engineer
description: Build high-performance microservices in Go. Design concurrent systems, implement gRPC APIs, and deploy services on Kubernetes. Focus on low-latency, high-throughput architectures.

title: Rust Systems Developer
description: Develop high-performance, memory-safe systems software in Rust. Build networking libraries, implement protocol parsers, and contribute to open-source security tooling.

title: Technical Lead - Web Platform
description: Lead a team of frontend and backend engineers building a SaaS platform. Drive technical decisions, conduct architecture reviews, and balance tech debt reduction with feature delivery.

title: Junior Backend Developer
description: Develop backend features using Python and Django. Write unit tests, implement database migrations, and learn to build secure, scalable web applications in a mentorship-focused environment.

title: DevOps Manager
description: Lead and grow a DevOps engineering team. Define infrastructure strategy, manage cloud budgets, and establish SRE practices. Drive organizational adoption of DevOps culture and tooling.

title: Data Scientist
description: Apply statistical methods and machine learning techniques to solve business problems. Build predictive models, conduct A/B testing, and communicate insights to stakeholders through data visualizations.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale. Build ML pipelines, optimize model performance, and implement model monitoring in production environments.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines and ETL processes. Design data warehouse schemas, implement data quality checks, and optimize query performance for analytics workloads.

title: AI Research Scientist
description: Conduct research in deep learning, natural language processing, or computer vision. Publish papers, develop novel architectures, and translate research breakthroughs into practical applications.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Build natural language processing systems for text classification, entity extraction, and sentiment analysis. Fine-tune large language models and develop production NLP pipelines.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop computer vision models for object detection, image segmentation, and video analysis. Deploy models on edge devices and cloud infrastructure with optimized inference performance.

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data to identify trends and insights. Create reports and dashboards, perform ad-hoc queries, and support data-driven decision making across the organization.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain ML infrastructure and model deployment pipelines. Implement experiment tracking, model versioning, and automated retraining workflows. Ensure model reliability in production.

title: LLM Application Developer
description: Build applications powered by large language models. Implement RAG architectures, develop prompt engineering strategies, and create conversational AI experiences using LangChain and vector databases.

title: Business Intelligence Developer
description: Design and build BI dashboards and reports using Tableau and Power BI. Develop data models, create KPI tracking systems, and work with stakeholders to translate business requirements into analytics solutions.

title: Data Platform Engineer
description: Architect and build modern data platforms using lakehouse architecture. Manage Databricks and Snowflake environments, implement data governance, and optimize costs across petabyte-scale data systems.

title: AI Security Researcher
description: Research adversarial attacks and defenses for ML models. Evaluate model robustness, develop red-teaming frameworks for LLMs, and publish findings on AI safety and security.

title: Cybersecurity Data Analyst
description: Apply data analysis techniques to security datasets. Build detection models using machine learning, analyze network traffic patterns, and create dashboards for security metrics and KPIs.

title: Security Software Engineer
description: Build security-focused software products including authentication systems, encryption libraries, and security scanning tools. Write secure code by default and conduct threat modeling for new features.

title: Network Engineer
description: Configure and maintain enterprise network infrastructure including routers, switches, and wireless controllers. Implement routing protocols, manage VLANs, and troubleshoot connectivity issues.

title: Systems Administrator
description: Manage Linux and Windows server environments. Handle patching, user management, backup systems, and monitoring. Automate routine tasks and maintain documentation.

title: Security Product Manager
description: Drive product strategy and roadmap for cybersecurity products. Gather customer requirements, prioritize features, and collaborate with engineering teams to deliver innovative security solutions.

title: Palo Alto SASE Engineer
description: Deploy and manage Palo Alto SASE solutions including Prisma Access and GlobalProtect. Implement secure web gateway policies, CASB controls, and DLP for remote workforce protection.

title: Junior Penetration Tester
description: Assist in penetration testing engagements under senior guidance. Conduct vulnerability scanning, perform basic exploitation, and contribute to assessment reports. Prepare for OSCP certification.

title: Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: Manage hybrid cloud infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible. Deploy applications across AWS and on-premises environments, implement GitOps workflows, and maintain CI/CD pipelines.

title: Security Automation Engineer
description: Develop automated security workflows and custom integrations between security tools. Build scripts for threat detection, incident enrichment, and response automation. Reduce manual SOC effort through tooling.

title: Data Scientist - Cybersecurity
description: Apply machine learning to cybersecurity challenges including anomaly detection, malware classification, and user behavior analytics. Build models using security telemetry data and deploy to production.

title: Full Stack Engineer - Security Platform
description: Build security management dashboards and investigation tools. Develop React frontends backed by Python APIs that process and visualize security event data from multiple sources.

title: Cloud Security Architect
description: Design comprehensive cloud security architectures for enterprise environments. Define security guardrails, implement landing zones, and establish cloud governance frameworks across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

title: Reverse Engineer
description: Reverse-engineer complex malware samples, firmware, and software binaries. Develop tooling for automated analysis, contribute to detection signatures, and support incident response with technical intelligence.

title: Junior Cloud Security Analyst
description: Monitor cloud environments for security misconfigurations and threats. Review AWS CloudTrail logs, investigate GuardDuty findings, and help maintain cloud security baselines.

title: Security Consultant
description: Provide expert cybersecurity consulting services to enterprise clients. Conduct security assessments, develop security strategies, and advise on regulatory compliance. Build and maintain client relationships.

title: Security Onion Analyst
description: Deploy and manage Security Onion for network security monitoring. Analyze Zeek logs, Suricata alerts, and full packet captures. Hunt for threats using network-based indicators and behavioral analysis.

title: Healthcare Security Engineer
description: Protect healthcare IT infrastructure and ensure HIPAA compliance. Manage security controls for EHR systems, medical devices, and clinical networks. Conduct security risk assessments and remediation.

title: Financial Security Analyst
description: Protect financial services infrastructure from cyber threats. Ensure PCI DSS compliance, monitor transaction systems for fraud indicators, and manage security for banking applications.

title: Deep Learning Engineer
description: Design and train deep neural network architectures for production systems. Optimize training pipelines, implement distributed training, and develop model compression techniques for edge deployment.

title: Principal Software Engineer
description: Drive technical strategy across multiple engineering teams. Solve the hardest technical challenges, establish engineering standards, and represent the engineering organization in strategic planning.

title: Junior Data Engineer
description: Support data pipeline development and maintenance. Write SQL queries, assist with ETL processes, and learn modern data stack tools under mentorship from senior data engineers.

title: Palo Alto Cortex Engineer
description: Deploy and manage the full Palo Alto Cortex suite including XDR, XSOAR, and XSIAM. Integrate Cortex products with existing security infrastructure and develop custom automations and detection rules.

title: DLP Engineer
description: Implement and manage data loss prevention solutions across endpoint, network, and cloud channels. Define DLP policies, investigate data exfiltration alerts, and ensure sensitive data protection.

title: CISO Advisory Consultant
description: Provide virtual CISO services to mid-market organizations. Develop security programs, create board-level reporting, manage security budgets, and align cybersecurity initiatives with business objectives.
